name: xianjiawei-lineoa

scripts.postinstall: node --check server.js && node --check social-server.js && node --check social-approved-originals.js && node --check social-final-reconcile.js && node --check social-schedule-policy.js && node --check social-review-center.js && node --check internal-social-review-safety.js && node --check internal-entry.js
scripts.test: node tools/release_check.js && node test.js && node catalog.test.js && node security.test.js && node function.test.js && node image-policy.test.js && node internal-app.test.js && node internal-app-pro.test.js && node facebook-page-token-bridge.test.js && node social-platform-status.test.js && node social-title-normalizer.test.js && node social-sequence-reorder.test.js && node social-official-rebuild.test.js && node social-approved-zip-import.test.js && node social-product-content-rebuild.test.js && node internal-social-review-safety.test.js && node internal-app-mobile.test.js && node internal-order-pricing.test.js && node internal-app-client-fix.test.js && node internal-app-button-contract.test.js && node internal-social-upload.test.js && node internal-app-upload-controller.test.js && node internal-app-form-controller.test.js && node internal-line-order-sync.test.js && node internal-reservation-rebuild.test.js && node line-order-cart.test.js && node internal-operations-suite.test.js && node supabase-state-bridge.test.js && node persistence-auto-save.test.js && node social-schedule-policy.test.js && node social-manual-schedule-override.test.js && node social-approved-originals.test.js && node social-final-reconcile.test.js
scripts.check:release: node tools/release_check.js && node social-approved-originals.test.js && node social-final-reconcile.test.js && node social-schedule-policy.test.js

description: 仙加味 LINE OA 正式版｜社群固定每週 2 篇：關心貼文週三 10:00、產品貼文週五 20:00；萬華氣候符合條件時只替換同一篇關心素材；使用既有核准小老闆原圖與正式產品 DM，不啟用自動拼圖流程
